items.title: Prepare groundwater policy: CM
items.desc: Bihar CM Samrat Choudhary urges officials to draft a groundwater policy and fast-track the Groundwater Management Act 2026 to curb overuse and boost recharge.

items.title: Anthropic’s powerful Mythos AI reportedly breached ‘almost all’ NSA classified systems within a few hours during red-tea
items.desc: Anthropic’s Mythos AI reportedly breached nearly all NSA classified systems during a controlled red-team test, according to a quote cited by The Economist. The report adds context to the U.S. government’s sudden restriction on Anthropic’s latest models.

items.title: Govt decides to post inspectors as SHOs in all police stations
items.desc: Bihar govt to post inspector-rank SHOs in 425 police stations, upgrading 217 under new criminal laws; move aims for faster, scientific probes with no new posts.

items.desc: The Trumps had a strange and snub-filled Father’s Day. President Trump posted a photo of a ‘great daughter’ who is not his kid on Truth Social. And the Trump Organization’s X post reads like Eric Trump is an only child.

items.title: Compensation eludes villagers displaced by 2023 disaster in Bageshwar
items.desc: Nearly three years after the 2023 monsoon disaster in Bageshwar’s Kapkot, 10–16 displaced families say compensation and rehabilitation remain pending.

items.desc: AIADMK leader EPS and party MLAs walk out of Tamil Nadu Assembly, alleging breach of privilege over amended Mekedatu resolution and lack of Rule 104 notice.
